title: wolfhsm-src/build.rs: missing rerun-if-changed for C source files
description: The build script compiles ~37 C files but only emits rerun-if-env-changed for 5 env vars. Changes to wolfHSM C source files won't trigger a rebuild unless the user does 'cargo clean'. Fix: emit cargo:rerun-if-changed for each C file in the source lists, and for wrapper.h in wolfhsm-sys/build.rs.
